Current weather forecasts for Chennai indicate no probability of rain, with hot and humid conditions, minimizing the risk of weather-related delays or abandonment. While New Zealand has faced reports of a depleted squad due to player illness and injuries to key players like Rachin Ravindra, Devon Conway, Finn Allen, Michael Bracewell, and Lockie Ferguson in the lead-up to the tournament, the published playing XI for today's match includes several of these players, indicating their participation. Therefore, there are no immediate indicators suggesting the market will resolve unexpectedly (e.g., Void, N/A, Push). The market is expected to resolve based on the finalized match result, as per the rules which account for ordinary wins, including those determined by DLS/DRS or forfeits.

edge_cases.description: Sri Lanka's fast bowler Eshan Malinga has been ruled out of the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 due to a shoulder injury. He has been replaced by Pramod Madushan in the squad after ICC approval.
edge_cases.evidence: Sri Lanka quick Eshan Malinga has been ruled out of the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 owing to a shoulder injury. The 25-year-old had sustained a blow during the recently concluded T20I series against England. In his stead, Sri Lanka have added Pramod Madushan to their squad for the tournament.

market_implication: The market is unlikely to be voided or result in N/A. While a player injury has occurred for Sri Lanka, a replacement has been approved and confirmed, meaning the match will proceed as scheduled with the updated squad. The low chance of rain also indicates a completed match. The market should resolve based on the finalized match result.

edge_cases.description: Miles McBride is out due to pelvic core muscle surgery. Dillon Jones is out on a G League two-way contract. OG Anunoby (Right Toe Soreness), Karl-Anthony Towns (Right Eye Laceration), and Josh Hart (Right Ankle Soreness) are all listed as questionable for the game.
edge_cases.evidence: Sports Illustrated (Feb 8, 2026) states Anunoby, Towns, and Hart are listed as questionable, while McBride and Jones are out. NBA CMS Injury Report (Feb 8, 2026) confirms McBride and Jones are out, and Anunoby, Hart, and Towns are questionable. The Action Network (Feb 8, 2026) also lists Towns as doubtful (laceration), Anunoby questionable (toe), and McBride out (ankle). iHeart Sports (Feb 7, 2026) indicates four Knicks players are on the injury report, including Karl-Anthony Towns.

edge_cases.description: Jayson Tatum is out due to a right Achilles repair. Max Shulga is out on a G League two-way contract. Sam Hauser is listed as questionable due to low back spasms.
edge_cases.evidence: NBA CMS Injury Report (Feb 8, 2026) states Tatum is out and Hauser is questionable. FOX Sports 1430 (Feb 8, 2026) lists Jayson Tatum as out (Achilles) and Sam Hauser as questionable (Back). iHeart Sports (Feb 7, 2026) confirms Tatum is out and Hauser is questionable. The Times of India (Feb 7, 2026) details Tatum's injury as a Right Achilles and Hauser's as a Right thumb strain, with Tatum out indefinitely.

market_implication: While both teams have key players injured or questionable, these are typical occurrences in NBA regular season games and are unlikely to lead to a market void or N/A resolution. The game is still expected to proceed as scheduled. The injuries primarily impact the competitive balance of the game rather than its official resolution as per the market rules.
